name: Chokethorn
location: Canonreeve Oraneth in Elden Hollow I, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you use a heal ability with a cost, you have a 33% chance to summon a strangler sapling that heals you or an ally for 6986 Health over 6 seconds. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Max Magicka or Stamina.
